<section id="sec-publications" class="research-section" data-section="publication">
<h2 class="section-heading">Publications</h2>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2025">2025</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">N.S. Yee, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, A.B. Benson, A. Turk, P.M. Boland, C. Peterson (2025).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">A phase II study of liposomal irinotecan in combination with oxaliplatin, leucovorin, and 5-fluorouracil (NALIRIFOX) in locally advanced pancreatic carcinoma: BTCRC-GI15-067.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*JCO Oncology Advances*.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1200/OA-25-00047">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">J.S. Brenman, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, A.W. Heinemann, Y. Chen, E.R. Felix, G.J. Farkas (2025).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Associations Between Obesity and Cardiometabolic, Physical, and Psychosocial Health in Chronic Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation*.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apmr.2025.11.018">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">G.J. Farkas, L.J. Caldera, D.D. Hodgkiss, J.R. Mitchell, T.F. Pelaez, M.A. Cusnier, A.J. Cole, S.G. Daniel, et al. (2025).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Cardiometabolic Risk in Chronic Spinal Cord Injury: A Systematic Review with Meta-Analysis and Temporal and Geographical Trends.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of clinical medicine*, 14(2872), 1-31.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3390/jcm14092872">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">A.T. Lato, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J.A. Parascando, S.F. Phillips, C.A. Onks, J.R. Loeffert (2025).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Enhancing Knowledge and Confidence in Wilderness Medicine Through Virtual Education: Lessons From a National Boot Camp.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Cureus*, 17(2).</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.7759/cureus.78689">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="information-theory methodology"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2025).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Entropy-based Sound-Character Mapping for Chinese Character Learning.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*International Journal of Chinese Language Teaching*, 6(2), 63-89.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_2025aa.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.46451/ijclt.20250205">DOI</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-supp" href="news/2025-entropy-chinese.html">Supplement</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="information-theory">Information Theory</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This research represents an innovative interdisciplinary application of data science methods to Chinese language learning, leveraging entropy-based analysis to enhance phonological awareness, listening skills, and character recognition. Supplementary materials for this study are available at https://www.arthurberg.com/entropy.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">G.J. Farkas, P.M. Cunningham, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, G. Jimsheleishvili, A.J. Mendez, D.R. Gater, M.S. Nash, B.J. Rolls (2025).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Gastrointestinal dysmotility and impaired gut peptide-satiety coupling in men with spinal cord injury.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Physiology & Behavior*, 305, 115207.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.physbeh.2025.115207">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">Z. Donato, A. Levy, A. Sneij, S. LaVela, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, L. Shapiro, G. Farkas (2025).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Grocery Shopping Behavior and Eating Behavior Differ Between Persons with and without a Spinal Cord Injury.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Topics in Spinal Cord Injury Rehabilitation*, 31(1), 66-76.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.46292/sci24-00028">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2024">2024</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="bayesian methodology"><div class="pub-meta">N. Hawila, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2024).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Bayesian Joint Modeling of Interrater and Intrarater Reliability with Multilevel Data.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Asian Journal of Statistics and Applications*, 1(1), 85-99.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Hawila_2024aa.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.47509/AJSA.2024.v01i01.06">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="bayesian">Bayesian</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div><div class="pub-annote">In collaboration with my PhD student, Nour Hawila, we introduce three Bayesian models for jointly analyzing interrater and intrarater reliability in multilevel data. These models, implemented in Stan, provide improved reliability estimates and explore the properties of different agreement measures through comparisons of kappa estimates and marginal correlations, using simulations and real-world datasets. This project originated from an earlier project with Family &amp; Community Medicine investigators that was published in <em>Sports Medicine</em>.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2024).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Causal inference from high-dimensional static data in soil microbiota networks: Comment on "Topological change of soil microbiota networks for forest resilience under global warming" by Gong et al.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Physics of life reviews*, 51, 281-282.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_2024aa.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.plrev.2024.10.012">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div><div class="pub-annote">Authored a commentary in <em>Physics of Life Reviews</em> on advanced causal inference methods in soil microbiota networks, highlighting the innovative use of GLMY homology theory and idopNetworks to infer interactions from high-dimensional static data without predefined causal models, and discussing their implications for understanding forest resilience under global warming.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">E. Allen, E. Goldstein, R. Lennon, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, C. Regner, R. Eiden, D. Symons Downs, J. Neiderhiser, et al. (2024).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">COVID-19 pandemic-related perceived loneliness as a potential risk factor for worse outcomes among people who are pregnant or postpartum.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Wisconsin Medical Journal*, 123(6), 515-520.</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">D. McGuire, H. Markus, L. Yang, J. Xu, A. Montgomery, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, Q. Li, L. Carrel, et al. (2024).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Dissecting heritability, environmental risk, and air pollution causal effects using> 50 million individuals in MarketScan.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Nature communications*, 15(1), 5357.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-49566-6">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2024).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Quantitative Methods for Precision Medicine: Pharmacogenomics in Action: Rongling Wu, Boca Raton, FL: Chapman & Hall/CRC Press.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of the American Statistical Association*, 119(546), 1690-1691.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/berg2024quantitative.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/01621459.2024.2303313">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div><div class="pub-annote">Published a review in <em>Journal of the American Statistical Association</em> on <em>Quantitative Methods for Precision Medicine: Pharmacogenomics in Action</em>, highlighting its innovative statistical genetics and pharmacogenomics approaches for advancing precision medicine.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">G.J. Farkas, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, A. Sneij, D.R. Dolbow, A.S. Gorgey, D.R. Gater (2024).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">The comparison of total energy and protein intake relative to estimated requirements in chronic spinal cord injury.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*British Journal of Nutrition*, 131(3), 489–499.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1017/S0007114523002088">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">C. Onks, L. Weaver, J. Latorre, M. Silvis, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, S. Phillips, J. Loeffert, C. French, et al. (2024).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">The most effective corticosteroid dose in the treatment of glenohumeral osteoarthritis: Feasibility pilot and protocol for double blinded randomized controlled trial.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Osteoarthritis and Cartilage Open*, 6(3), 100484.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ocarto.2024.100484">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">V. Vangala, Y. Chen, S.S. Dinavahi, K. Gowda, N.A. Lone, M. Herlyn, J. Drabick, K. Helm, et al. (2024).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Tumor Heterogeneity Shapes Survival Dynamics in Drug-Treated Cells, Revealing Size-Drifting Subpopulations.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*ACS Pharmacology & Translational Science*, 7(11), 3573-3584.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1021/acsptsci.4c00453">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">M.E. Healy, L.H. Messer, M.G. Stasinopoulos, S.E. Brewer, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, T.K. Oser (2024).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Understanding patient and health care provider perceptions of barriers and facilitators to diabetes care in immigrant and refugee populations.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Discover Public Health*, 21(88), 1-12.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1186/s12982-024-00208-8">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2023">2023</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research methodology statistics-education"><div class="pub-meta">A. Darby, J.A. Parascando, M. Lipinski, C. Lipinski, M. Mendez-Miller, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D. Rabago, T.K. Oser (2023).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Awareness and interest in osteopathic manipulative treatment in allopathic medical students.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Osteopathic Medicine*, 123(8), 379-384.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1515/jom-2022-0232">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistics-education">Statistics Education</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-trials-methods methodology"><div class="pub-meta">N. Hawila, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2023).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Exact-corrected confidence interval for risk difference in noninferiority binomial trials.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Biometrics*, 79(2), 1133-1144.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Hawila_2022ud.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/biom.13688">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-trials-methods">Clinical Trials</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This is very interesting work in the area of noninferiority clinical trials. Working with my PhD student, we developed a novel confidence interval estimator for the risk difference that utilizes the noninferiority parameter. This exact-based confidence interval estimator is ``more powerful'' than Chan's exact-based procedure. This paper has interesting theory and significant methodological advancements.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">K. Karpa, J. Ward, M. Stegman, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, S.L. Leong (2023).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">IPEx: A gamification tool for learner application of pharmacologic principles of opioid use, misuse, and addiction.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Pharmacology Research & Perspectives*, 11(5), e01141.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1002/prp2.1141">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">M. Larsen, F. He, Y.I. Kawasawa, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, A.N. <h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2022">2022</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">G.J. Farkas, A. Swartz, A. Gorgey, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D. Gater (2022).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Acute exercise improves glucose effectiveness but not insulin sensitivity in paraplegia.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Disability and Rehabilitation*, 44(17), 4656-4662.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/09638288.2021.1913517">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">T.D. Riley, J.A. Radico, J. Parascando, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, T.K. Oser (2022).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Challenges in Effective Faculty and Provider Recognition to Enhance Engagement.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Family Medicine*, 54(6), 461-465.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.22454/FamMed.2022.324428">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">C. Tom, N. Jeganathan, M. Deutsch, W. Koltun, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J. Scow (2022).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Characteristics and Outcomes of Right- Versus Left-Sided Early Onset Colorectal Cancer.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Diseases of the Colon and Rectum*.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1097/dcr.0000000000002273">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">L. Lafferty, J. Wawrzyniak, M. Chambers, T. Pagliarulo, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, N. Hawila, M. Silvis (2022).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Clinical indoor running gait analysis may not approximate outdoor running gait based on novel drone technology.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Sports health*, 14(5), 710–716.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1177/19417381211050931">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">D. Schlegel, C. Heron, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J. Parascando, M. Silvis (2022).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Diagnoses per Encounter by Telephone, Televideo, and In-Office Visits.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of the American Board of Family Medicine*, 35(3), 491-496.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3122/jabfm.2022.03.210451">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="pediatric-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">E.K. Batra, V.J. Palusci, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2022).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Factors associated with child maltreatment fatality among children with an open Child Protective Services case at death.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Child Abuse Review*, 31(e2734), 1-14.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1002/car.2734">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="pediatric-oncology">Pediatric Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">D.R. Dolbow, G.J. Farkas, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, M.A. Welsch, A.S. Gorgey, D.R. Gater (2022).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Fat to lean mass ratio in spinal cord injury: Possible interplay of components of body composition that may instigate systemic inflammation and metabolic syndrome.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The Journal of Spinal Cord Medicine*, 45(6), 833-839.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/10790268.2022.2111900">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">S.S. Dinavahi, Y. Chen, R. Gowda, P.K. Dhanyamraju, K. Punnath, D. Desai, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, S.R. Kimball, et al. (2022).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Targeting Protein Translation in Melanoma by Inhibiting EEF-2 Kinase Regulates Cholesterol Metabolism though SREBP2 to Inhibit Tumor Development.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*International Journal of Molecular Sciences*, 23, 3481(1-19).</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3390/ijms23073481">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">S.S. Dinavahi, Y. Chen, K. Punnath, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, M. Herlyn, M. Foroutan, N.D. Huntington, G.P. Robertson (2022).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Targeting WEE1/AKT restores p53-dependent NK cell activation to induce immune checkpoint blockade responses in 'cold' melanoma.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Cancer Immunology Research*, 10(6), 757-769.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1158/2326-6066.CIR-21-0587">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2021">2021</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="bayesian methodology"><div class="pub-meta">J. Liao, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, T.L. McMurry (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">A Robustified Posterior for Bayesian Inference on a Large Number of Parallel Effects.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The American Statistician*, 75(2), 145-151.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Liao_21a.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/00031305.2019.1701549">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="bayesian">Bayesian</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This paper details a novel robustified posterior distribution by decomposing the posterior into two parts (represented in equation 7 of the paper), in which one of the parts is robustified using its asymptotic limit that does not depend on the true underlying distribution.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">Y. Chen, S.S. Dinavahi, Q. Feng, R. Gowda, S. Ramisetti, X. Xia, K.B. LaPenna, V.R. Chirasani, et al. (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Activating Sphingosine-1-phospahte signaling in endothelial cells increases myosin light chain phosphorylation to decrease endothelial permeability thereby inhibiting cancer metastasis.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Cancer Letters*, 506, 107–119.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.canlet.2021.01.004">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research clinical-trials-methods methodology"><div class="pub-meta">N. Hawila, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Assessing the impact of COVID-19 on registered interventional clinical trials.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Clinical and Translational Science*, 14(3), 1147-1154.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Hawila_21.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/cts.13034">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-trials-methods">Clinical Trials</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This work received funding from Penn State CTSI. Biostatistics PhD student, Nour Hawila, presented this work at Penn State College of Medicine Graduate Research Forum and the Penn State Graduate Exhibition. This highly impactful research was featured on over 14 news outlets including <em>US News &amp; World Report</em>, <em>Penn State News</em> (<a href="https://news.psu.edu/story/653097/2021/04/07/research/clinical-trial-completion-rates-decline-during-covid-19-pandemic">https://news.psu.edu/story/653097/2021/04/07/research/clinical-trial-completion-rates-decline-during-covid-19-pandemic</a>), and <em>ABC 27</em> television news.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="bayesian methodology statistics-education"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Bayesian explorations with dice.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Teaching Statistics*, 43, 114–123.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_21b.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/test.12271">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="bayesian">Bayesian</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistics-education">Statistics Education</span></div><div class="pub-annote">An intreresting take on teaching Bayesian Statistics is presented using an R Shiny Application and trick dice. I used this model in my graduate-level Bayesian statistics class to show Kullback-Leibler divergence can be effective in certain Bayesian statistics applications. This article was also translated into German and published in <em>Stochastik in der Schule</em>.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="bayesian methodology statistics-education"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Bayesian Modeling Competitions for the Classroom.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Colombian Journal of Statistics*, 44(2), 243-252.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_21a.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.15446/rce.v44n2.89102">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="bayesian">Bayesian</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistics-education">Statistics Education</span></div><div class="pub-annote">Three educational and engaging competitions are described for students studying Bayesian statistics. These competitions are meant to inspire students to think creatively, challenge students to develop effective Bayesian models, and motivate students to pursue excellence in competition with their peers. All of these competitions have been tried out in my own graduate-level Bayesian Statistics course.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">D.R. Gater Jr, G.J. Farkas, D.R. Dolbow, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, A.S. Gorgey (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Body Composition and Metabolic Assessment After Motor Complete Spinal Cord Injury: Development of a Clinically Relevant Equation to Estimate Body Fat.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Topics in Spinal Cord Injury Rehabilitation*, 27(1), 11–22.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.46292/sci20-00079">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">B.P. Kline, T. Weaver, D.L. Brinton Jr, L. Harris, G.S. Yochum, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, W.A. Koltun (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Clinical and Genetic Factors Impact Time to Surgical Recurrence After Ileocolectomy for Crohn's Disease.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Annals of Surgery*, 274(2), 346–351.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1097/SLA.0000000000003660">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">B.P. Kline, G.S. Yochum, D.L. Brinton, K.M. Schieffer, T. Weaver, L. Harris, S. Deiling, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, et al. (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">COLQ and ARHGAP15 are associated with diverticular disease and are expressed in the colon.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Surgical Research*, 267, 397–403.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jss.2021.05.043">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">G.J. Farkas, P.S. Gordon, N. Trewick, A.S. Gorgey, D.R. Dolbow, E. Tiozzo, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D.R.G. Jr (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Comparison of Various Indices in Identifying Insulin Resistance and Diabetes in Chronic Spinal Cord Injury.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Clinical Medicine*, 10(23), 5591: 1-16.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3390/jcm10235591">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="bayesian methodology"><div class="pub-meta">J. Liao, V. Midya, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Connecting and contrasting the Bayes factor and a modified ROPE procedure for testing interval null hypotheses.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The American Statistician*, 75(3), 256-264.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Liao_21.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/00031305.2019.1701550">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="bayesian">Bayesian</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This paper promotes an interval null framework for Bayesian hypothesis testing and provides a very convenient way of calculating the Bayes factor. I presented a poster on this topic at the recent United States Conference on Teaching Statistics (\rurlUSCOTS 2019 Poster.pdf) and discussed these ideas with Professor Kruschke at that meeting.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">A. O'Donovan, S.M. Oser, J. Parascando, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D.E. Nease Jr, T.K. Oser (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Determining the Perception and Willingness of Primary Care Providers to Prescribe Advanced Diabetes Technologies.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Patient-Centered Research and Reviews*, 8(3), 272–276.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.17294/2330-0698.1819">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">U. Golla, M.A. Ehudin, C. Annageldiyev, Z. Zeng, D.B. Tukaramrao, A. Tarren, A.A. Date, I. Elcheva, et al. (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">DJ4 Targets the Rho-Associated Protein Kinase Pathway and Attenuates Disease Progression in Preclinical Murine Models of Acute Myeloid Leukemia.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Cancers*, 13(19), 4889.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3390/cancers13194889">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">G.J. Farkas, A.S. Gorgey, D.R. Dolbow, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D.R. Gater Jr (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Energy Expenditure, Cardiorespiratory Fitness, and Body Composition Following Arm Cycling or Functional Electrical Stimulation Exercises in Spinal Cord Injury: A 16-Week Randomized Controlled Trial.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Topics in Spinal Cord Injury Rehabilitation*, 27(1), 121–134.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.46292/sci20-00065">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">J. Radico, T.K. Oser, T.B. Fausnight, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, A. Ouyang, S.L. Leong (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Factors that Influence Work Family Conflict for Women Faculty.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*MedEdPublish*, 10(63), 1-13.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.15694/mep.2021.000063.1">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">S. Veldheer, C. Scartozzi, C. Bordner, C. Opara, B. Williams, L. Weaver, D. Rodriguez, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, et al. (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Impact of a prescription produce program on diabetes and cardiovascular risk outcomes.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Nutrition Education and Behavior*, 53(12), 1008-1017.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jneb.2021.07.005">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research pediatric-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">G. Raca, H. Abdel-Azim, F. Yue, J. Broach, J.L. Payne, M.E. Reeves, C. Gowda, J. Schramm, et al. (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Increased Incidence of IKZF1 deletions and IGH-CRLF2 translocations in B-ALL of Hispanic/Latino children–-a novel health disparity.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Leukemia*, 35, 2399-2402.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41375-021-01133-4">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="pediatric-oncology">Pediatric Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="bayesian methodology statistics-education"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, N. Hawila (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Introducing Bayesian inference with the taxicab problem.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Proceedings of the 10th Australian Conference on Teaching Statistics*, 55-60.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_21d.pdf">PDF</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="bayesian">Bayesian</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistics-education">Statistics Education</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This paper discusses a remarkably simple problem with an interesting history. After discussing the historical significance of this problem, we discuss how it can serve as a useful tool for introducing Bayesian statistical methods to tertiary students. A Shiny application was developed to accompany this paper.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">D. McGuire, Y. Jiang, M. Liu, J.D. Weissenkampen, S. Eckert, L. Yang, F. Chen, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, et al. (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Model-based assessment of replicability for genome-wide association meta-analysis.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Nature Communications*, 12(1964), 1–14.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-021-21226-z">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">R. Liu, C. Onks, J. Petscavage-Thomas, E. Walker, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, M. Silvis, A. Dhawan (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Prevalence of shoulder labral abnormalities on MRI in a non-athletic asymptomatic young adult population.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Skeletal Radiology*, 50(5), 921-925.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00256-020-03629-z">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">M. Partin, A. Sanchez, J. Poulson, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J. Parascando, S.I. Ramirez (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Social inequities between prenatal patients in family medicine and obstetrics and gynecology with similar outcomes.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The Journal of the American Board of Family Medicine*, 34(1), 181–188.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3122/jabfm.2021.01.200279">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research methodology statistics-education"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, N. Hawila (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Some Teaching Resources Using R with Illustrative Examples Exploring COVID-19 Data.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Teaching Statistics*, 43, S98-S109.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/test.12258">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistics-education">Statistics Education</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This is a rather long paper (6,000 words plus two supplementary documents), prepared with PhD graduate student Nour Hawila. After four rounds of substantive revisions we are quite excited about this work that advocates for the use of the R software platform in teaching statistics and data science, complete with interesting discussions of COVID-19 and race.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology statistics-education"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Statistical analysis of the International Mathematical Olympiad.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The Mathematical Intelligencer*, 43(1), 105-112.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_21c.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00283-020-10015-z">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistics-education">Statistics Education</span></div><div class="pub-annote">A massive amount of scoring data is available on students participating in the IMO, and this paper provides a wealth of information spanning the contest itself, gender disparities, performances associated with different countries and over time, potential biases associated with a home-field advantage, and a host of other insights gleaned from this unique dataset. This work is to be presented at MathFest 2021.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research methodology statistics-education"><div class="pub-meta">J. Loeffert, C. Onks, S. Phillips, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D. Rodgers (2021).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Wilderness Medicine Boot Camp for Primary Care Sports Medicine Fellows Goes Virtual: From Uncertain Times Comes a Novel Approach to Traditional In- person Teaching.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Interdisciplinary Journal of Virtual Learning in Medical Sciences*, 12(2), 2-7.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.30476/IJVLMS.2021.89866.1083">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistics-education">Statistics Education</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2020">2020</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">R. Block, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, R.P. Lennon, E.L. Miller, M. Nunez-Smith (2020).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">African American adherence to COVID-19 public health recommendations.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*HLRP: Health Literacy Research and Practice*, 4(3), e166–e170.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3928/24748307-20200707-01">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-trials-methods methodology"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2020).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Assessing the impact of the NIH CTSA program on clinical trials registered with clinicaltrials.gov..</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Clinical and Translational Science*, 13, 818-825.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_20a.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/cts.12775">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-trials-methods">Clinical Trials</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div><div class="pub-annote">In this paper I investigated the impact of the CTSA program on translational research. This paper involves advanced Bayesian modeling with a large and complex dataset and a novel approach to statistical inference utilizing the posterior predictive distribution.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="bayesian methodology statistics-education"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2020).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Bayesian statistics in the classroom: Introducing shrinkage with basketball statistics and the internet movie database.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Teaching Statistics*, 42(2), 47-53.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_20b.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/test.12220">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="bayesian">Bayesian</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistics-education">Statistics Education</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This article promotes Bayesian intuition by introducing the concept of shrinkage with some motivational examples involving basketball statistics of Rudy Gobert and movie rankings from the Internet Movie Database.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">B.P. Kline, T. Weaver, D.L. Brinton Jr, S. Deiling, G.S. Yochum, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, W.A. Koltun (2020).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Clinical and Genetic Factors Associated With Complications After Crohn's Ileocolectomy.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Diseases of the Colon & Rectum*, 63(3), 357-364.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1097/DCR.0000000000001574">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">S.S. Dinavahi, R. Gowda, K. Gowda, C.G. Bazewicz, V.R. Chirasani, M.B. Battu, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, N.V. Dokholyan, et al. (2020).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Development of a Novel Multi-Isoform ALDH Inhibitor Effective as an Antimelanoma Agent.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Molecular Cancer Therapeutics*, 19(2), 447–459.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1158/1535-7163.MCT-19-0360">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">O.F. Noel, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, N. Onyango, D.R. Mackay (2020).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Ethnic and Gender Diversity Comparison between Surgical Patients and Caring Surgeons.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Plastic and Reconstructive Surgery Global Open*, 8(10), 1–7.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1097/GOX.0000000000003198">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">T. Riley, W. Curry, M. Beck, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, M. Ruffin (2020).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Feasibility of Nonanonymous Burnout Surveys in a Large Academic Department.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Family Medicine*, 52(4), 278–281.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.22454/FamMed.2020.471855">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">G.J. Farkas, P.S. Gordon, A.M. Swartz, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D.R. Gater (2020).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Influence of mid and low paraplegia on cardiorespiratory fitness and energy expenditure.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Spinal Cord Series and Cases*, 6(1), 1–10.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41394-020-00363-5">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology nonparametric-methods"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D. Politis, K. Suaray, H. Zeng (2020).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Reduced bias nonparametric lifetime density and hazard estimation.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*TEST*, 29, 704-727.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_20e.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11749-019-00677-z">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="nonparametric-methods">Nonparametric</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This paper uses flat-top kernels for reduced bias estimation in censored density estimation and hazard function estimation. A tailored bandwidth selection algorithm also accompanies this kernel-based estimator.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology statistics-education"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2020).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Statistical analysis of the Elo rating system in chess.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Chance*, 33(3), 31-38.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_20d.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/09332480.2020.1820249">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistics-education">Statistics Education</span></div><div class="pub-annote">In this article I detail the mathematical and statistical framework for the Elo system, and then proceed to analyze the accuracy of the Elo system with real world data using two chess databases -- one database containing chess games played by humans and another database containing chess games played by computers.</div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2019">2019</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">F. He, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, Y.I. Kawasawa, E.O. Bixler, J. Fernandez-Mendoz, E.A. Whitsel, D. Liao (2019).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Association between DNA methylation in obesity-related genes and body mass index percentile in adolescents.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Scientific Reports*, 9(2079), 1-8.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/He_19.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-019-38587-7">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div><div class="pub-annote">I developed the novel methods involved in this manuscript and worked hand-in-hand with Fan He and Duanping Liao from start to finish of this paper. I also presented work related to this at the European Sleep Meeting in Bologna, Italy and in an Epidemiology seminar at Penn State.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">G.J. Farkas, A.S. Gorgey, D.R. Dolbow, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D.R. Gater (2019).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Caloric Intake Relative to Total Daily Energy Expenditure Using a Spinal Cord Injury–Specific Correction Factor: An Analysis by Level of Injury.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*American Journal of Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation*, 98(11), 947–952.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1097/PHM.0000000000001166">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">S.M. Oser, H.L. Stuckey, J.A. Parascando, E.L. McGinley, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, T.K. Oser (2019).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Glycated hemoglobin differences among blog-reading adults with type 1 diabetes compared with those who do not read blogs: cross-sectional study.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*JMIR diabetes*, 4(2), e13634.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.2196/13634.">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">G.J. Farkas, M.A. Pitot, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D.R. Gater (2019).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Nutritional status in chronic spinal cord injury: a systematic review and meta-analysis.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Spinal Cord*, 57(1), 3–17.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41393-018-0218-4">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">D.R. Gater Jr, G.J. Farkas, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, C. Castillo (2019).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Prevalence of metabolic syndrome in veterans with spinal cord injury.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The Journal of Spinal Cord Medicine*, 42(1), 86–93.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/10790268.2017.1423266">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research spinal-cord-injury"><div class="pub-meta">G.J. Farkas, A.S. Gorgey, D.R. Dolbow, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D.R. Gater (2019).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Sex dimorphism in the distribution of adipose tissue and its influence on proinflammatory adipokines and cardiometabolic profiles in motor complete spinal cord injury.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The Journal of Spinal Cord Medicine*, 42(4), 430–436.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/10790268.2018.1436125">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology nonparametric-methods"><div class="pub-meta">J. Liao, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2019).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Sharpening Jensen's inequality.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The American Statistician*, 73(3), 278-281.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Liao_19.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/00031305.2017.1419145">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="nonparametric-methods">Nonparametric</span></div><div class="pub-annote">In the midst of us working on an importance sampling paper (still under preparation), we identified an interesting formulation of Jensen's inequality that we subsequently carefully formalized and developed into this paper. The results are so elegant and fundamental that I have updated the Wikipedia pages for the entries on Jensen's inequality and the Rao-Backwell Theorem based on this work. This work will be presented at the ANZSC 2021 conference.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">S.M. Matthews, M.A. Eshelman, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, W.A. Koltun, G.S. Yochum (2019).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">The Crohn's disease associated SNP rs6651252 impacts MYC gene expression in human colonic epithelial cells.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*PLoS ONE*, 14(2).</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0212850">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">D. Brunke-Reese, P. Ssentongo, A.E. Ssentongo, B.E. Phillips, E.M. Pauli, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, S.L. Kelleher, D.I. Soybel (2019).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">The Role of Genetic Variant rs13266634 in SLC30A8/ZnT8 in Postoperative Hyperglycemia After Major Abdominal Surgery.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The Journal of Clinical Endocrinology & Metabolism*, 104(9), 3877–3892.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/doi.org/10.1210/jc.2018-02588">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2018">2018</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">S.S. Dinavahi, M.A. Noory, R. Gowda, J.J. Drabick, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, R.I. Neves, G.P. Robertson (2018).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Moving synergistically acting drug combinations to the clinic by comparing sequential versus simultaneous drug administrations.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Molecular Pharmacology*, 93(3), 190–196.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1124/mol.117.110759">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>

Berg</span>, J. Foulds (2018).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Pilot randomized trial of an automated smoking cessation intervention via mobile phone text messages as an adjunct to varenicline in primary care.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Health Communication*, 23(4), 370–378.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/10810730.2018.1453890">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>

Warnick, D. Kondziolka, B. Kavanagh (2018).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Quality of life outcomes for brain metastasis patients treated with stereotactic radiosurgery: pre-procedural predictive factors from a prospective national registry.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Neurosurgery*, 131(6), 1848–1854.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3171/2018.8.JNS181599">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="neuroscience">Neuroscience</span></div></div></div>

Cherian (2018).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">The effect of elevated A1c on immediate postoperative complications: a prospective observational study.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Clinical Diabetes*, 36(2), 128–132.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.2337/cd17-0081">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>

Gater (2018).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">The influence of level of spinal cord injury on adipose tissue and its relationship to inflammatory adipokines and cardiometabolic profiles.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The Journal of Spinal Cord Medicine*, 41(4), 407–415.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/10790268.2017.1357918">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="spinal-cord-injury">Spinal Cord Injury</span></div></div></div>

Foulds (2018).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">The use of self-directed relapse prevention booklets to assist in maintaining abstinence after a 6-week group smoking cessation treatment program: A randomized controlled trial.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Health Education & Behavior*, 45(2), 190–197.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1177/1090198117710979">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>

Stauffer, J. Foulds (2018).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">TXT2STAYQUIT: pilot randomized trial of brief automated smoking cessation texting intervention for inpatient smokers discharged from the hospital.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Hospital Medicine*, 13(7), 488-489.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.12788/jhm.2907">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2017">2017</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">K. Crowell, K. Julian, M. Katzman, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, A. Tinsley, E. Williams, W. Koltun, E. Messaris (2017).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Compliance with Clostridium difficile treatment guidelines: effect on patient outcomes.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Epidemiology & Infection*, 145(11), 2185–2192.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1017/S0950268817000644">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">P.F. Wrafter, T.M. Connelly, J.S. Khan, B.C. Lucey, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, W. Koltun, W.P. Joyce (2017).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Diverticular disease is associated with benign intra-abdominal cystic disease.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Expert Review of Gastroenterology & Hepatology*, 11(5), 487–490.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/17474124.2017.1294061">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">T.M. Connelly, C.S. Choi, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, L. Harris III, J. Coble, W.A. Koltun (2017).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Diverticulitis and Crohn's disease have distinct but overlapping tumor necrosis superfamily 15 haplotypes.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Surgical Research*, 214, 262–269.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jss.2017.02.030">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">R.E. Andrew, A. Lauria, F.J. Puleo, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D.B. Stewart Sr (2017).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Inpatient infliximab is ineffective at preventing colectomy for steroid refractory extensive colitis.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Surgical Research*, 219, 18–24.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jss.2017.05.077">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2016">2016</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">H.R.S. Tagaram, D. Desai, G. Li, D. Liu, C.B. Rountree, K. Gowda, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, S. Amin, et al. (2016).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">A selenium containing inhibitor for the treatment of hepatocellular cancer.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Pharmaceuticals*, 9(18), 1–14.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3390/ph9020018">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="bayesian methodology"><div class="pub-meta">J. Liao, D. Liao, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2016).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Calibrated Bayes factors in assessing genetic association models.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*The American Statistician*, 70(3), 250-256.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Liao_16.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/00031305.2015.1109548">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="bayesian">Bayesian</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div><div class="pub-annote">Calibrated Bayes methods have been extensively described by Prof Rod Little (U Mich), although concrete examples and specific implementations are largely unavailable. In this paper, Jason and I identified an elegant example in genetic association testing in which Bayesian calibration proves very powerful.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">C.S. Choi, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, W. Sangster, K.M. Schieffer, L.R. Harris III, S.M. Deiling, W.A. Sciamanna, J. Foulds (2014).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Once bitten, twice shy: concern about gaining weight after smoking cessation and its association with seeking treatment.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*International Journal of Clinical Practice*, 68(3), 388–395.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/ijcp.12332">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">W. Amin, F. Tsui, C. Borromeo, C.H. Chuang, J.U. Espino, D. Ford, W. Hwang, W. Kapoor, et al. (2014).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">PaTH: towards a learning health system in the Mid-Atlantic region.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of the American Medical Informatics Association*, 21(4), 633–636.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1136/amiajnl-2014-002759">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="bayesian methodology statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">J. Liao, T. McMurry, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2014).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Prior robust empirical Bayes inference for large-scale data by conditioning on rank with application to microarray data.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Biostatistics*, 15(1), 60-73.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Liao_14.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1093/biostatistics/kxt026">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="bayesian">Bayesian</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This paper proposes a very interesting idea for robustifying Bayesian inference by cleverly conditioning on the ranks of the data. This novel approach can allow for a more robust Bayesian inference in certain applications, and we have provided extensive theoretical developments in this paper.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology"><div class="pub-meta">M.D. Dennis, C.S. Coleman, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, L.S. Jefferson, S.R. Koltun (2014).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">The Expression of Colonic TAGAP is Affected By Severity of Crohn's Disease Inflammation and The Rs212388 Allele.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Surgical Research*, 186(2), 499.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jss.2013.11.118">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>

Stewart (2013).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">A single nucleotide polymorphism in the STAT5 gene favors colonic as opposed to small-bowel inflammation in Crohn's disease.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Diseases of the Colon & Rectum*, 56(9), 1068–1074.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1097/DCR.0b013e31829de128">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>

Berg</span>, S. Oppenheimer, et al. (2012).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Skin color variation in Orang Asli tribes of Peninsular Malaysia.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*PLoS ONE*, 7(8).</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0042752">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">E.Y. Popova, X. Xu, A.T. DeWan, A.C. Salzberg, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J. Hoh, S.S. Zhang, C.J. Barnstable (2012).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Stage and gene specific signatures defined by histones H3K4me2 and H3K27me3 accompany mammalian retina maturation in vivo.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*PLoS ONE*, 7(10).</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0046867">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology nonparametric-methods"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, T. McMurry, D.N. Politis (2012).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Testing time series linearity: Traditional and bootstrap methods.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Handbook of Statistics*, 30, 27-42.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_12.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/B978-0-444-53858-1.00002-8">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="nonparametric-methods">Nonparametric</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This is a survey of various linearity tests in time series analysis; note that this is linearity testing for stationary processes. A novel subsampling-based linearity test is also proposed and its asymptotic consistency is proven.</div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2011">2011</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">G. Fu, J. Luo, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, Z. Wang, J. Li, K. Das, R. Li, R. Wu (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">A dynamic model for functional mapping of biological rhythms.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Biological Dynamics*, 5(1), 84–101.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/17513758.2010.491558">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>

(2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">DLG5 P1371Q is associated with inflammatory bowel disease and complementary to R30Q in disease susceptibility.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Swiss Medical Weekly*, 141(w13290), 1-7.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.4414/smw.2011.13290">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
