Berg</span> (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Electronic cigarettes (e-cigs): views of aficionados and clinical/public health perspectives.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*International Journal of Clinical Practice*, 65(10), 1037–1042.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1742-1241.2011.02751.x">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, N. Li, C. Tong, Z. Wang, S. Berceli, R. Wu (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Functional mapping of expression quantitative trait loci that regulate oscillatory gene expression.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Methods Mol Biol*, 734, 241-255.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_11.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-61779-086-7_12">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This paper models time-course gene expression with a robust Fourier series mean structure and ARMA autocovariance structure.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">Z. Lin, G. John, J.P. Hegarty, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, W. Yu, Y. Wang, A.A. Kelly, B.Z. Peterson, et al. (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Genetic Variants and Monoallelic Expression of Surfactant Protein-D in Inflammatory Bowel Disease.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Annals of Human Genetics*, 75(5), 559–568.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1469-1809.2011.00662.x">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">W. Yu, J.P. Hegarty, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, X. Chen, G. West, A.A. Kelly, Y. Wang, L.S. Poritz, et al. (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">NKX2-3 transcriptional regulation of endothelin-1 and VEGF signaling in human intestinal microvascular endothelial cells.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*PLoS ONE*, 6(5), e20454: 1–10.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0020454">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">G. John, J.P. Hegarty, W. Yu, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D.M. Pastor, A.A. Kelly, Y. Wang, L.S. Poritz, et al. (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">NKX2-3 variant rs11190140 is associated with IBD and alters binding of NFAT.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Molecular Genetics and Metabolism*, 104(1-2), 174–179.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ymgme.2011.06.023">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">G. Ramesh, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, C. Jayakumar (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Plasma netrin-1 is a diagnostic biomarker of human cancers.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Biomarkers*, 16(2), 172–180.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3109/1354750X.2010.541564">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">J. Cupp, Z. Simmons, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, S.H. Felgoise, S.M. Walsh, H.E. Stephens (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Psychological health in patients with ALS is maintained as physical function declines.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis*, 12(4), 290–296.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3109/17482968.2011.554555">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">R. Sehgal, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, R. Figueroa, L.S. Poritz, K.J. McKenna, D.B. Stewart, W.A. Koltun (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Risk factors for surgical site infections after colorectal resection in diabetic patients.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of the American College of Surgeons*, 212(1), 29–34.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jamcollsurg.2010.09.011">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">A.K. Sharma, C.L. Kline, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, S. Amin, R.B. Irby (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">The Akt inhibitor ISC-4 activates prostate apoptosis response protein-4 and reduces colon tumor growth in a nude mouse model.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Clinical Cancer Research*, 17(13), 4474–4483.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1158/1078-0432.CCR-10-2370">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="adult-oncology clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">L.S. Poritz, R. Sehgal, K. Hartnett, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, W.A. Koltun (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Tumor volume and percent positive lymph nodes as a predictor of 5-year survival in colorectal cancer.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Surgery*, 150(4), 649–655.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.surg.2011.07.049">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2010">2010</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology nonparametric-methods"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, E. Paparoditis, D.N. Politis (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">A bootstrap test for time series linearity.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Statistical Planning and Inference*, 140(12), 3841-3857.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_10.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jspi.2010.04.047">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="nonparametric-methods">Nonparametric</span></div><div class="pub-annote">A bootstrap algorithm is proposed in this paper for testing Gaussianity and linearity in stationary time series, and consistency of the relevant bootstrap approximations is proven rigorously.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">G. Fu, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, K. Das, L. Jiahan, L. Runze, R. Wu (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">A statistical model for mapping morphological shape.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Theoretical Biology and Medical Modelling*, 7(28), 1–14.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1186/1742-4682-7-28">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology nonparametric-methods"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, K. Suaray (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Bootstrap bandwidth selection for a smooth survival function estimator from censored data.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Statistical Research*, 44(2), 207-217.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_10a.pdf">PDF</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="nonparametric-methods">Nonparametric</span></div><div class="pub-annote">In this paper we propose a new estimator for the survival function that uses the so-called Peterson representation of the survival function and establish its strong consistency. A bandwidth selection procedure based on Efron's censored bootstrap accompanies the estimator.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">D.R. Drost, C.I. Benedict, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, E. Novaes, C.R. Novaes, Q. Yu, C. Dervinis, J.M. Maia, et al. (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Diversification in the genetic architecture of gene expression and transcriptional networks in organ differentiation of Populus.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences*, 107(18), 8492–8497.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.0914709107">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">N. Li, T. McMurry, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, Z. Wang, S.A. Berceli, R. Wu (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Functional clustering of periodic transcriptional profiles through ARMA(p, q).</span> <span class="pub-venue">*PLoS ONE*, 5(4).</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0009894">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">J. Luo, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, K. Ahn, K. Das, J. Li, Z. Wang, Y. Li, R. Wu (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Functional genomewide association studies of longitudinal traits.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Handbook of Adaptive Designs in Pharmaceutical and Clinical Development*, 402–415.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1201/b10279-24">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">K. Ahn, J. Luo, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D. Keefe, R. Wu (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Functional mapping of drug response with pharmacodynamic–pharmacokinetic principles.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Trends in Pharmacological Sciences*, 31(7), 306–311.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.tips.2010.04.004">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">G. Chen, N.E. Giambrone, D.F. Dluzen, J.E. Muscat, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, C.J. Gallagher, P. Lazarus (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Glucuronidation genotypes and nicotine metabolic phenotypes: importance of functional UGT2B10 and UGT2B17 polymorphisms.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Cancer Research*, 70(19), 7543–7552.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1158/0008-5472.CAN-09-4582">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">Q. He, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, Y. Li, C.E. Vallejos, R. Wu (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Mapping genes for plant structure, development and evolution: functional mapping meets ontology.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Trends in Genetics*, 26(1), 39–46.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.tig.2009.11.004">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">Y. Li, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, L.R. Wu, Z. Wang, G. Chen, R. Wu (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Modeling the aneuploidy control of cancer.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*BMC Cancer*, 10(346), 1–9.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1186/1471-2407-10-346">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">M. Lin, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, R. Wu (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Modeling the Genetic Etiology of Pharmacokinetic–Pharmacodynamic Links with the ARMA Process.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Biopharmaceutical Statistics*, 20(2), 351–372.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/10543400903572795">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">R. Sehgal, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J.P. Hegarty, A.A. Kelly, Z. Lin, L.S. Poritz, W.A. Koltun (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">NOD2/CARD15 mutations correlate with severe pouchitis after ileal pouch-anal anastomosis.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Diseases of the Colon & Rectum*, 53(11), 1487–1494.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/DCR.0b013e3181f22635">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, T.L. McMurry, D.N. Politis (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Subsampling p-values.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Statistics and Probability Letters*, 80, 1358-1364.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_10b.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.spl.2010.04.018">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This paper explores theoretical and finite-sample properties of subsampling proceedures that can be used to generate p-values in hypothesis testing.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, Q. He, Y. Shen, Y. Chen, M. Huang, R. Wu (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Trilocus disequilibrium analysis of multiallelic markers in outcrossing populations.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Statistical Applications in Genetics and Molecular Biology*, 9(1), 1-22.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_10c.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.2202/1544-6115.1528">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div><div class="pub-annote">This paper develops a nice mathematical model for analyzing linkage disequilibrium in the presence of multiallelic markers.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">B. Kim, T. McMurry, W. Zhao, R. Wu, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Wavelet-based functional clustering for patterns of high-dimensional dynamic gene expression.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Computational Biology*, 17(8), 1067-1080.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Kim_10.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1089/cmb.2009.0270">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2009">2009</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">Y. Li, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, M.N. Chang, P. Du, K. Ahn, D. Mauger, D. Liao, R. Wu (2009).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">A statistical model for genetic mapping of viral infection by integrating epidemiological behavior.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Statistical Applications in Genetics and Molecular Biology*, 8(1), 38: 1–22.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.2202/1544-6115.1475">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">I. Abramson, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2009).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">An occupancy problem arising in power law fitting.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Internet Mathematics*, 6(1), 19-28.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Abramson_09.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/15427951.2009.10129178">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div><div class="pub-annote">In this paper a truncation rule for estimating the degree of a power law is developed and consistency is proven. Of particular note in this paper are the interesting manipulations of the Riemann Zeta function to establish the proof of the main theorem.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D. Politis (2009).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">CDF and survival function estimation with infinite-order kernels.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Electronic Journal of Statistics*, 3, 1436-1454.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_09a.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1214/09-EJS396">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div><div class="pub-annote">In this paper I build on the ideas of deficiency as originally introduced by Hodges and Lehman in their 1970 <em>Annals</em> paper by developing the concept of a deficiency rate and apply it in the context of CDF and survival function estimation with infinite-order kernels. Utilizing tools learned from my PhD studies in Mathematics, I embraced the mathematical theory of generalized functions to prove some of the theorems in this paper.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">Y. Cheng, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, S. Wu, Y. Li, R. Wu (2009).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Computing genetic imprinting expressed by haplotypes.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Methods Mol Biol*, 189–212.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-60761-247-6_11">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">Q. He, Y. Shen, Y. Chen, Y. Zhou, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, R. Wu, M. Huang (2009).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Development of 16 polymorphic simple sequence repeat markers for Lycoris longituba from expressed sequence tags.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Molecular Ecology Resources*, 9(1), 278–280.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1755-0998.2008.02322.x">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">R. Wu, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, Q. Li (2009).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Discussion: Why do we test multiple traits in genetic association studies?.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of the Korean Statistical Society*, 1(38), 11–13.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jkss.2008.10.004">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology nonparametric-methods"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D. Politis (2009).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Higher-order accurate polyspectral estimation with flat-top lag-windows.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Annals of the Institute of Statistical Mathematics*, 61(2), 477-498.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_09b.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s10463-007-0154-0">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="nonparametric-methods">Nonparametric</span></div><div class="pub-annote">In this paper I developed the flat-top kernel methodology to polyspectral estimation and provide an accompanying bandwidth selection algorithm.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">S. Wen, C. Wang, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, Y. Li, M.M. Chang, R.B. Fillingim, M.R. Wallace, R. Staud, et al. (2009).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Modeling genetic imprinting effects of DNA sequences with multilocus polymorphism data.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Algorithms for Molecular Biology*, 4(11), 1–11.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1186/1748-7188-4-11">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">W. Hou, T. Liu, Y. Li, Q. Li, J. Li, K. Das, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, R. Wu (2009).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Multilocus genomics of outcrossing plant populations.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Theoretical Population Biology*, 76(1), 68–76.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.tpb.2009.04.005">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">S. Wu, J.S. Yap, Y. Li, Q. Li, G. Fu, J. Li, K. Das, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, et al. (2009).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Network models for dissecting plant development by functional mapping.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Current Bioinformatics*, 4(3), 183–187.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.2174/157489309789071093">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2008">2008</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">B. Kim, L. Zhang, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J. Fan, R. Wu (2008).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">A computational approach to the functional clustering of periodic gene-expression profiles.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Genetics*, 180(2), 821–834.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1534/genetics.108.093690">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">C. Ma, Q. Yu, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D. Drost, E. Novaes, G. Fu, J.S. Yap, A. Tan, et al. (2008).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">A statistical model for testing the pleiotropic control of phenotypic plasticity for a count trait.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Genetics*, 179(1), 627–636.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1534/genetics.107.081794">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology nonparametric-methods"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2008).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Multivariate lag-windows and group representations.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Multivariate Analysis*, 99(10), 2479-2496.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Berg_08.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jmva.2008.02.038">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="nonparametric-methods">Nonparametric</span></div><div class="pub-annote">Professor Persi Diaconis wrote a popular book that uses group representations (from abstract algebra) in various probability and statistics applications. In this manuscript, I provide a new application of group representations to solving a problem that arises in time series analysis.</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="methodology"><div class="pub-meta">B. Brumback, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span> (2008).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">On effect-measure modification: Relationships among changes in the relative risk, odds ratio, and risk difference.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Statistics in Medicine*, 27(18), 3453–3465.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-pdf" href="papers/Brumback_08.pdf">PDF</a> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.3246">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2007">2007</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="publication" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">D.L. Kane, D. Kilb, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, V.G. Martynov (2007).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Quantifying the remote triggering capabilities of large earthquakes using data from the ANZA Seismic Network catalog (southern California).</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth*, B11302(1–14).</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1029/2006JB004714">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
</section>

Poritz, W. Koltun (2012).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">ATG16L1 Polymorphism is Associated with Increased Risk of Emergency Colectomy in Ulcerative Colitis.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*IRISH JOURNAL OF MEDICAL SCIENCE*, 181(S6), S174–S175.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11845-012-0839-0">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div><div class="pub-annote">XXXVIIth Sir Peter Freyer Memorial Lecture and Surgical Symposium, 2012</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="abstract" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">Y. Sun, J.B. Guttenplan, T. Cooper, C. Aliaga, J. Krzeminski, K. Chen, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, S. Amin, et al. (2012).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Comparable mutagenicity and carcinogenicity of (-)-[R, R]-and (+)-[S, S]-trans-1, 2-dihydro-1, 2-dihydroxy6-nitrochrysene in the rat mammary gland.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*ABSTRACTS OF PAPERS OF THE AMERICAN CHEMICAL SOCIETY*, 244.</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="abstract" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">R. Sehgal, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J. Polinski, J. Hegarty, Z. Lin, K. McKenna, D. Stewart, L. Poritz, et al. (2012).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Mutations in IRGM are Associated with More Frequent Need for Surgery in Patients with Ileocolonic Crohn's Disease (CD).</span> <span class="pub-venue">*IRISH JOURNAL OF MEDICAL SCIENCE*, 181(S6), S184–S184.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11845-012-0839-0">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div><div class="pub-annote">XXXVIIth Sir Peter Freyer Memorial Lecture and Surgical Symposium, 2012</div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2011">2011</h3>

Yu, Z. Lin, et al. (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Association of the IL12-IL23-JAK2 inflammatory cascade with anal disease in patients with ileocolonic Crohn's disease. P-019..</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Inflammatory Bowel Diseases*, 17(suppl\_1), S17–S17.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1093/ibd/17.supplement1.S17a">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div><div class="pub-annote">Abstract P-019, Advances in IBD 2010</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="abstract" data-areas="clinical-research statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">R. Sehgal, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J. Polinski, J. Hegarty, A. Kelly, Z. Lin, L. Poritz, W. Koltun (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Correlation Of Gene Haplotypes With Complications After Ileal Pouch Anal Anastomosis.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Journal of Surgical Research*, 165(2), 211–212.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jss.2010.11.566">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div><div class="pub-annote">Academic Surgical Congress 2011</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="abstract" data-areas="clinical-research statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">R. Sehgal, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J. Hegarty, A. Kelly, Z. Lin, L. Poritz, W. Koltun (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Gene Signature Modeling to Predict Risk of Crohn's Disease (CD) like Complications or Severe Pouchitis (SP) after Ileal Pouch Anal Anastomosis (IPAA).</span> <span class="pub-venue">*DISEASES OF THE COLON &amp; RECTUM*, 54(5), E15–E16.</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="abstract" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">R. Sehgal, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J. Hegarty, A. Kelly, Z. Lin, L. Poritz, W. Koltun (2011).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">MUTATIONS IN IRGM ARE ASSOCIATED WITH MORE FREQUENT NEED FOR SURGERY IN ILEOCOLONIC CROHN'S DISEASE (CD) PATIENTS..</span> <span class="pub-venue">*DISEASES OF THE COLON &amp; RECTUM*, 54(5), E15–E15.</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2010">2010</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="abstract" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">Z. Lin, G. John, J.P. Hegarty, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, T. Li, D.M. Pastor, A.A. Kelly, Y. Wang, et al. (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">W1236 NOD2 Mutations Compromise Host Defense Mechanisms to Enteric Bacteria as Shown by Decreased NF-kB in Human B Cells After Muramyl Dipeptide (MDP) Stimulation.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Gastroenterology*, 138(5), S–680.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/S0016-5085(10)63128-9">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div><div class="pub-annote">Abstract W1236, Digestive Disease Week (DDW) 2010</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="abstract" data-areas="clinical-research statistical-genetics"><div class="pub-meta">G. John, Z. Lin, J.P. Hegarty, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, D.M. Pastor, A.A. Kelly, Y. Wang, L.S. Poritz, et al. (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">W1247 Nkx2-3 Variant Rs11190140 is Associated With IBD and Alters NFAT Transcription Factor Binding.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*Gastroenterology*, 138(5), S–683.</span> <a class="pub-badge pub-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/S0016-5085(10)63138-1">DOI</a><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="statistical-genetics">Statistical Genetics</span></div><div class="pub-annote">Abstract W1247, Digestive Disease Week (DDW) 2010</div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="abstract" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta">R. Sehgal, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, J. Hegarty, A. Kelly, Z. Lin, L. Poritz, W. Koltun (2010).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">NOD2 MUTATIONS CORRELATE WITH SEVERE POUCHITIS AFTER ILEAL POUCH-ANAL ANASTOMOSIS.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*DISEASES OF THE COLON &amp; RECTUM*, 53(4), 542–542.</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="pub-year" data-year="2005">2005</h3>
<div class="pub-entry" data-type="abstract" data-areas="bayesian methodology"><div class="pub-meta">D. Kane, D. Kilb, <span class="pub-me">A. Berg</span>, V. Martynov (2005).</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Quantifying Properties Of Triggering (Non-Triggering) Local Mainshock/Aftershock Sequences: Establishing Thresholds That Can Be Applied To Remote Mainshock/Aftershock Triggering Studies.</span> <span class="pub-venue">*AGU Fall Meeting Abstracts*.</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="bayesian">Bayesian</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="methodology">Methodology</span></div></div></div>
</section>
<section id="sec-grants" class="research-section" data-section="grant">
<h2 class="section-heading">Grants</h2>
<p class="section-intro">Extramural research support — active, pending, and completed awards.</p>
<h3 class="grant-status-heading" data-status="active">Active</h3>
<div class="pub-entry grant-entry" data-type="grant" data-areas="adult-oncology clinical-trials-methods pediatric-oncology"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="status-badge status-active">Active</span> 01/2025–12/2027 · PI: Giselle Saulnier Sholler · Cannonball Kids' Cancer Foundation</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Cannonball Kid's Sponsor Cost BCC022: Phase II Trial of Naxitamab and Tipifarnib for Relapsed/Refractory Neuroblastoma.</span> <span class="pub-venue">Budget: $200,000 · # 293814</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-trials-methods">Clinical Trials</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="pediatric-oncology">Pediatric Oncology</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry grant-entry" data-type="grant" data-areas="clinical-trials-methods pediatric-oncology"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="status-badge status-active">Active</span> 04/2025–12/2027 · PI: Giselle Saulnier Sholler · Trial Blazers for Kids Foundation</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Trailblazers portion of Cannonball Kid's Sponsor Cost BCC022: Phase II Trial of Naxitamab and Tipifarnib for Relapsed/Refractory Neuroblastoma.</span> <span class="pub-venue">Budget: $133,300 · # 298322</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-trials-methods">Clinical Trials</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="pediatric-oncology">Pediatric Oncology</span></div></div></div>

<div class="pub-entry grant-entry" data-type="grant" data-areas="pediatric-oncology"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="status-badge status-active">Active</span> 07/2023–06/2026 · PI: Arati Sharma · Four Diamonds Fund Research Program</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Combination Therapy for Childhood Acute Myeloid Leukemia.</span> <span class="pub-venue">Budget: $250,000 · # 4D21_2024_1002-EXT</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="pediatric-oncology">Pediatric Oncology</span></div></div></div>

<div class="pub-entry grant-entry" data-type="grant" data-areas="neuroscience"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="status-badge status-active">Active</span> 08/2021–04/2027 · PI: Prasanna Karunanayaka · National Institute on Aging</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Linking olfactory deficits to memory impairment and AD neurodegeneration.</span> <span class="pub-venue">Budget: $3,855,438 · # 5 R01 AG070088-05-EXT</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="neuroscience">Neuroscience</span></div></div></div>

<h3 class="grant-status-heading" data-status="completed">Completed</h3>
<div class="pub-entry grant-entry" data-type="grant" data-areas="clinical-research"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="status-badge status-completed">Completed</span> 6/8/2023-7/31/2023 · PI: William Kenney · National Institute on Aging</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Characterization of passive and active whole-body heat stress responses in obese and non-obese adults.</span> <span class="pub-venue">Role: Other · Budget: $215,064 · # 1 F32 AG079581-01A1</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-research">Clinical Research</span></div></div></div>
<div class="pub-entry grant-entry" data-type="grant" data-areas="adult-oncology clinical-trials-methods"><div class="pub-meta"><span class="status-badge status-completed">Completed</span> 5/1/2022-4/30/2025 · PI: Seyed Mansouri · National Cancer Institute</div><div class="pub-body"><span class="pub-title">Neuro-pharmacological Properties of Repurposed Posaconazole in Glioblastoma: A Phase 0 Clinical Trial.</span> <span class="pub-venue">Role: Other · Budget: $140,846 · # 1 R03 CA255992-01A1</span><div class="area-tags"><span class="area-tag" data-area="adult-oncology">Adult Oncology</span><span class="area-tag" data-area="clinical-trials-methods">Clinical Trials</span></div></div></div>
